description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android Docker image. Define a cache keyed by the project ID that stores the .gradle directory and a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository .gradle folder and makes gradlew executable. Add a build stage with two jobs: assembleDebug runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, and lintDebug runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:lintDebug -PbuildDir=lint. Add a test stage with a testDebug job that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:testDebug. No artifacts, rules, or services are defined.
